Levels.early: Discrimination task starts 6 seconds after the trial onset.
Levels.late: Discrimination task starts 12 seconds after the trial onset.

Levels.dm_task_pre: Presentation of cue preceding the reference onset for the discrimination task.
Levels.dm_task: Presentation of reference (two yellow nonius dots) for the discrimination task.
Levels.dm_task_post: Presentation of cue following the discrimination task (reference) offset.
Levels.em_task_pre: Presentation of cue preceding the response frame onset for the estimation task.
Levels.em_task: Presentation of response frame (two green nonius dots) presentation for the estimation task.
Levels.em_task_post: Presentation of cue following the estimation task (response frame) offset.

value_reference.LongName: Orientation of reference relative to stimulus
value_reference.Description: Orientation of reference relative to stimulus (in degrees), with positive values indicating a clockwise direction.

Levels.1: Keypress indicating the remembered stimulus is clockwise relative to the reference.
Levels.-1: Keypress indicating the remembered stimulus is counterclockwise relative to the reference.
